class.help:
Personas asociadas a una liquidacion (Legajo)
Referencia a Atributos de la tabla Legajo.v_nombredecolumna EJ:Legajo.v_o_personal_liq
Referencia a FK de la tabla Legajo.v_anotationname.[0].v_nombredecolumna EJ:Legajo.v_PERSONAL.v_c_zona_sijp Personal.
class.label: Personal Liquidación DDO
class.name: PER_LIQ_DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_per_liq_ddo as oi_per_liq_ddo, t0.oi_per_liq_ddo as CODE, t0.oi_per_liq_ddo as TEXT, t0.oi_liquidacion_ddo as oi_liquidacion_ddo, t0.oi_per_emp_ddo as oi_per_emp_ddo FROM LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ as t0 ORDER BY oi_per_liq_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_per_liq_ddo as oi_per_liq_ddo FROM LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ as t0 ORDER BY oi_per_liq_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.name: VariablesNovedad
assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Empleado de Novedad3

assosiation.name: VariablesPeriodo
assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad Periodo
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad 2

form-properties.label: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad 2

assosiation.name: VariablesAnno
assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad Periodo
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Empleado Año/Periodo de Novedad

form-properties.label: Valores Variables Empleado Año/Periodo de Novedad

assosiation.name: NovedadesCargo
assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
assosiation.label: Novedades de Cargo

resource.declare: <FILTRO oi_liquidacion_ddo="533" oi_empresa_ddo="113" oi_per_emp_ddo="10945" oi_personal_emp="1" oi_liquidacion="48" oi_cab_conc_ddo="157" oi_var_ejec_ddo="62" oi_codif_ddo="17" e_periodo="201009" />
resource.name: QRYPersonalLiquidacion

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_personal_liq FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as t WHERE t.oi_personal_emp={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and t.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.n_valor , t.n_cantidad , tr.c_concepto, tq.oi_concepto_ddo FROM LIQ25_CONC_MAN_PER as t, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as tr, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as tq JOIN t.oi_concepto INNER tr.oi_concepto , tr.c_concepto INNER tq.c_concepto WHERE t.oi_personal_liq = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_liq} and tq.oi_cab_conc_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_cab_conc_ddo}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_liq= {#PARAM:@oi_personal_liq} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.n_valor , t.e_periodo , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_liq= {#PARAM:@oi_personal_liq} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.oi_total FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ30_TOTALES as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql7
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor) as valor, sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_cantidad) as cantidad, LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS, LIQ30_TOTALES, LIQ30_CONC_SUM, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'F\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'C\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo=LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto=LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto and LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_concepto and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_total=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_total and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo={#PARAMIN:@e_periodo} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@c_variable} group by LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql8
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT va.c_variable FROM LIQ30_RECI_SUM as rs, LIQ09_VARIABLES as va JOIN rs.oi_variable INNER va.oi_variable WHERE rs.oi_total = {#PARAM:@oi_total} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql9

resource.declare: <FILTRO oi_personal_emp="1429" oi_cab_conc_ddo="904" oi_empresa_ddo="1803" oi_var_ejec_ddo="902" oi_codif_ddo="1503" oi_liquidacion="2353" e_periodo="201908" MODO="VariablesNovedad.concepto"/>
resource.name: QRYPersonalParcial

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_personal_liq, t.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as t WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and t.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ConceptosManuales
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , t.n_cantidad , tr.c_concepto, tq.oi_concepto_ddo FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ25_CONC_MAN_PER as t, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as tr, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as tq JOIN t.oi_concepto INNER tr.oi_concepto , tr.c_concepto INNER tq.c_concepto, PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE PL.oi_liquidacion = ({%=#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion %}) and PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tq.oi_cab_conc_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_cab_conc_ddo} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable, PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and PL.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesAnno
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , t.e_periodo , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable, PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE (t.e_periodo>={number(1+100*(number(substring($PARAM/@e_periodo,0,4))-1))} AND t.e_periodo<={number(12+100*number(substring($PARAM/@e_periodo,0,4)))}) and PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and PL.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC, e_periodo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad.lista
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.oi_total FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ30_TOTALES as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad.concepto
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor) as valor, sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_cantidad) as cantidad, LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS, LIQ30_TOTALES, LIQ30_CONC_SUM, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ95_VARIABLES where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'F\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'C\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo=LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto=LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto and LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_concepto and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_total=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_total and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable=LIQ95_VARIABLES.c_variable AND LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo={#PARAM:@e_periodo} group by LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadesCargo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.oi_cargo, t.n_valor FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO as t, PER02_CARGOS as c, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as l JOIN PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq, tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable, t.oi_cargo INNER c.oi_cargo, PL.oi_liquidacion INNER l.oi_liquidacion WHERE GETPER(c.f_ingreso) <= l.e_periodo AND (isnull(c.f_egreso) or GETPER(c.f_egreso) >= l.e_periodo) AND l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} AND PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql8
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT va.c_variable FROM LIQ30_RECI_SUM as rs, LIQ09_VARIABLES as va JOIN rs.oi_variable INNER va.oi_variable WHERE rs.oi_total = {#PARAM:@oi_total} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql9
VariablesNovedad.Test
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT count(tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo) as T FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ30_TOTALES as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadesCargo.Test
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT count(t.oi_cargo) as TC FROM LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO as t, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL JOIN PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE PL.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, max(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq) as oi_personal_liq from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as tp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, ORG03_EMPRESAS, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ as t
JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER tp.e_numero_legajo, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa where tp.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo%}) and tp.c_empresa = ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa and t.oi_per_emp_ddo = tp.oi_per_emp_ddo and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} group by PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ConceptosManuales
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , t.n_cantidad , t.c_concepto, t.oi_concepto_ddo from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as tp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, (SELECT max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo) as oi_liquidacion_ddo, max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo) as oi_per_liq_ddo, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo FROM LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) Group by LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo ) as LIQ98_PER_LIQ, LIQ98_CONC_MAN_PER as t JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER tp.e_numero_legajo, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa where tp.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %} ) and tp.c_empresa = ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa and LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo = tp.oi_per_emp_ddo and t.oi_per_liq_ddo = LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_concepto ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable, PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and PL.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesPeriodo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , t.oi_variable_ddo, t.c_variable, t.e_periodo from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as tp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, LIQ98_VAL_VARPN as t, (SELECT max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo) as oi_liquidacion_ddo, max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo) as oi_per_liq_ddo, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo FROM LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) Group by LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo ) as LIQ98_PER_LIQ JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER tp.e_numero_legajo, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa where tp.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) and tp.c_empresa = ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa and LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo = tp.oi_per_emp_ddo and t.oi_per_liq_ddo = LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC, e_periodo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesAnno
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor_1 , t.n_valor_2 , t.n_valor_3 , t.n_valor_4 , t.n_valor_5 , t.n_valor_6 , t.n_valor_7 , t.n_valor_8 , t.n_valor_9 , t.n_valor_10 , t.n_valor_11 , t.n_valor_12 , t.e_anno , t.oi_variable_ddo, t.c_variable from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as tp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, (SELECT max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo) as oi_liquidacion_ddo, max(LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo) as oi_per_liq_ddo, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo FROM LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) Group by LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo ) as LIQ98_PER_LIQ, LIQ98_VAL_N_ANNO as t JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER tp.e_numero_legajo, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa where tp.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo %} ) and tp.c_empresa = ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa and LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo = tp.oi_per_emp_ddo and t.oi_per_liq_ddo = LIQ98_PER_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC, e_anno ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad.lista
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.oi_total FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ30_TOTALES as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY c_variable ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesNovedad.concepto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor) as valor, sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_cantidad) as cantidad, LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS, LIQ30_TOTALES, LIQ30_CONC_SUM, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ95_VARIABLES where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'F\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'C\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per=LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per and LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo=LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto=LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto and LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_concepto and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_total=LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_total and LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable=LIQ95_VARIABLES.c_variable AND LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo={#PARAM:@e_periodo} and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion in ({%=#PARAM:@listids%})
group by LIQ30_CONC_SUM.c_suma, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadesCargo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PL.oi_personal_emp, tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.oi_cargo, t.n_valor FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO as t, PER02_CARGOS as c, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as l JOIN PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq, tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable, t.oi_cargo INNER c.oi_cargo, PL.oi_liquidacion INNER l.oi_liquidacion WHERE GETPER(c.f_ingreso) <= l.e_periodo AND (isnull(c.f_egreso) or GETPER(c.f_egreso) >= l.e_periodo) AND l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} AND PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql8
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT va.c_variable FROM LIQ30_RECI_SUM as rs, LIQ09_VARIABLES as va JOIN rs.oi_variable INNER va.oi_variable WHERE rs.oi_total = {#PARAM:@oi_total} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql9
VariablesNovedad.Test
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT count(tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo) as T FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, LIQ09_VARIABLES as tv, LIQ30_TOTALES as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadesCargo.Test
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT count(t.oi_cargo) as TC FROM LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO as t, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL JOIN PL.oi_personal_liq INNER t.oi_personal_liq WHERE PL.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIQ_GENERA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liq_genera FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'C\' and isnotnull(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liq_genera)
')/ROWS

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.name: VAL_VAREN_DDO
class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
class.label: Valor Variable Empleado Novedad DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.name: VAL_VARPN_DDO
class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad Periodo
class.description: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad 2
class.label: Valor Variable Empleado Novedad DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad Periodo
class.description: Valores Variables Empleado Año/Periodo de Novedad
class.label: Valor Variable Empleado Novedad DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
class.label: Novedad Cargo DDO
class.name: VAREN_CARGO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:
